title: Position Report
description: Provide a position report to a coast station as part of a routine traffic list.
task: Call RCC Haifa on Channel 16 and provide your position report.
stationPrompt:
A student vessel is calling to provide a position report.

NAME REPETITION RULES (abbreviated format — used for ALL station responses):
- Called vessel name: 1 time.
- Your station name after THIS IS: 2 times.

Turn 1 — Student calls with their position, course, and speed.
Your reply: <vessel name>, THIS IS RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA, ROGER YOUR POSITION REPORT, NOTHING FURTHER, OUT.

If the student gives position but omits course or speed:
<vessel name>, THIS IS RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA, ROGER, CONFIRM YOUR COURSE AND SPEED, OVER.

If the student's call is unclear or missing position:
<vessel name>, THIS IS RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA, SAY AGAIN YOUR POSITION, OVER.

If you cannot identify the calling vessel:
STATION CALLING RCC HAIFA, SAY AGAIN, OVER.

Do not provide position information yourself. Do not add any words beyond the formats above.
scriptReference: {{stationName}}, THIS IS {{vesselName}}, MY POSITION {{position}}, COURSE {{course}}, SPEED {{speed}} KNOTS, OVER

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_STATION
scriptedResponses.text: BLUE DUCK, THIS IS RCC HAIFA RCC HAIFA, ROGER YOUR POSITION REPORT, NOTHING FURTHER, OUT.

hints: Call the coast station and identify yourself
State MY POSITION followed by your coordinates
Include course and speed if known
